title: Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd!
